name: CloudWeave

releases.author: abcamus
releases.description: Fix: use activeDocument for popout window compatibility
releases.name: v0.1.3

releases.author: abcamus
releases.description:
### ✨ New Features
- **Grid view**: toggle between list/grid in the cloud file picker
- **Multi-select**: check files/directories and batch insert via the footer button
- **Lucide icons**: file type icons now use Obsidian-compatible Lucide SVGs
- **Unified toolbar**: compact toolbar with cloud selector, breadcrumbs, search toggle and view switcher
- **Always-visible footer**: the insert button stays pinned at the bottom of the picker
- **Vertical cascade**: batch-inserted nodes fan out without overlapping

### 🔧 Improvements
- Cloud insert button uses `mod-draggable` class to match native card-menu buttons
- Scrollbar always visible in file list
- Folder icon uses manual SVG for consistent closed-folder rendering across Obsidian versions
releases.name: v0.1.2 — Grid view & multi-select
